parts.text: {"name":"Classic Spaghetti Carbonara","recipeIngredient":["400g spaghetti","200g pancetta or guanciale","4 large eggs","100g Pecorino Romano cheese, grated","1 tsp freshly ground black pepper","Salt for pasta water"],"recipeInstructions":["Bring a large pot of heavily salted water to a boil and cook spaghetti until al dente.","Fry pancetta in a large skillet over medium heat until crispy, about 5 minutes.","Whisk together eggs, grated Pecorino Romano, and black pepper in a bowl.","Reserve 1 cup of pasta cooking water, then drain the spaghetti.","Off heat, add hot pasta to the pancetta pan, pour egg mixture over and toss vigorously with pasta water to create a creamy sauce.","Serve immediately topped with extra cheese and black pepper."],"prepTime":"PT10M","cookTime":"PT20M","recipeYield":"4 servings"}
